name: Amazon Braket
description: A managed cloud service for building, simulating, and running quantum workloads across multiple hardware providers.
whyUseIt: Braket is useful when you want one interface for comparing platforms, using managed simulators, and experimenting with real devices without committing to a single vendor too early.
fieldPosition: Cloud orchestration, cross-platform exploration, and benchmark access
engineerWorkflow: Prototype locally, launch managed simulations, compare available backends, then run carefully scoped experiments on real devices.
managerExpects: Platform choices tied to specific experiment goals and cost awareness.
demoDescription: Run the same small benchmark across two simulator settings and compare to a live hardware run if available.
beginnerMistakes: Burning budget on hardware runs before validating locally
Comparing different backends without controlling for problem setup
